title: Add PetalGen to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PetalGen](https://petalgen.tools4all.ai) to build
- PetalGen is a prompt engineering tool for AI image generation powered by Pollinations API key . Paste any monolithic image prompt and it decomposes it into structured, remixable modules (Subject, Clot

Fixes #11421

gist.headline: Petal power
gist.blurb: PetalGen just sprouted in the greenhouse! This clever new community app takes your giant image prompts and breaks them down into neat, remixable modules.
gist.summary: Added PetalGen, a community-built prompt engineering tool that decomposes monolithic image prompts into structured, remixable modules, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover PetalGen in the Greenhouse to easily break down, analyze, and refine complex image generation prompts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a botanist/engineer, carefully examining or assembling a glowing flower where each petal represents a different prompt module (Subject, Clothing, etc.).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, carefully arranging glowing lime green (#ecf874) and pastel pink petals around a mechanical flower. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays structured code blocks. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, carefully arranging glowing lime green (#ecf874) and pastel pink petals around a mechanical flower. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays structured code blocks. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
